chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 115 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 21.01.2026 Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- No one is present for the applicant. So was the case on the earlier two dates. Matters stands dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
